name: giusto-agentic
description: Agentic engineering tooling: a spec-driven shape/decide/execute/measure/eval workflow that treats work as a graph — fan-out across subagents with adversarial verification — plus README maintenance.

plugins.name: agentic-engineering
plugins.description: Spec-driven agentic engineering as graph engineering: /pitch -> /adr -> /ship -> /measure -> /eval, plus /graph to fan work out across executor, researcher, reviewer, verifier, measurer subagents (diamond / router / verifier / cycle) with verification hooks.

plugins.name: github-keeper
plugins.description: Make a public GitHub repo well-made and honest: /readme audits & elevates READMEs — deriving the hero, voice, and elements from the PROJECT's own identity (fidelity gate, propose-and-confirm), plus free-form targeted edits; /opensource adds community-health files, an honest CI gate, and the right repo settings. Honesty-first; confirms outward actions.
